note: Free, openly-licensed children's book libraries in South African languages. All are Creative Commons licensed (mostly CC BY), so titles may be imported into MzansiLingo with attribution. Until specific titles are bundled for offline use, these open in the browser.

sources.name: African Storybook
sources.blurb: Thousands of openly-licensed picture storybooks in all SA languages. Read online, download, or print.

sources.name: Book Dash
sources.blurb: ~500 beautiful children's books across 11 SA languages, free to read, translate and share.

sources.name: Nal'ibali
sources.blurb: South Africa's national reading-for-enjoyment campaign. Stories in all official languages.

sources.name: Global Digital Library
sources.blurb: Openly-licensed early-grade reading resources in many languages, including SA languages.
